changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into case_tab ( case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag, tab_key, name, tab_order, type, content_key, created_by, created_on, show_tasks ) select ct.case_definition_key, cd.case_definition_version_tag, ct.tab_key, ct.name, ct.tab_order, ct.type, ct.content_key, ct.created_by, ct.created_on, ct.show_tasks from case_tab ct join case_definition cd on cd.case_definition_key = ct.case_definition_key

insert into case_widget_tab ( case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag, tab_key ) select ct.case_definition_key, ct.case_definition_version_tag, cwt.tab_key from case_widget_tab cwt join case_tab ct on cwt.case_definition_key = ct.case_definition_key and cwt.tab_key = ct.tab_key and ct.case_definition_version_tag is not null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into case_widget_tab_widget ( key, title, case_widget_type, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag, tab_key, sort_order, width, high_contrast, properties, actions ) select cwtw.key, cwtw.title, cwtw.case_widget_type, cwtw.case_definition_key, cwt.case_definition_version_tag, cwtw.tab_key, cwtw.sort_order, cwtw.width, cwtw.high_contrast, cwtw.properties, cwtw.actions from case_widget_tab_widget cwtw join case_widget_tab cwt on cwtw.case_definition_key = cwt.case_definition_key and cwtw.tab_key = cwt.tab_key where cwt.case_definition_version_tag is not null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into case_widget_tab_widget ( `key`, title, case_widget_type, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag, tab_key, sort_order, width, high_contrast, properties, actions ) select cwtw.key, cwtw.title, cwtw.case_widget_type, cwtw.case_definition_key, cwt.case_definition_version_tag, cwtw.tab_key, cwtw.sort_order, cwtw.width, cwtw.high_contrast, cwtw.properties, cwtw.actions from case_widget_tab_widget cwtw join case_widget_tab cwt on cwtw.case_definition_key = cwt.case_definition_key and cwtw.tab_key = cwt.tab_key where cwt.case_definition_version_tag is not null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: delete from case_widget_tab_widget where case_definition_version_tag is null
delete from case_widget_tab where case_definition_version_tag is null
delete from case_tab where case_definition_version_tag is null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into form_io_form_definition (id, name, form_definition, read_only, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag) select gen_random_uuid(), fd.name, fd.form_definition, fd.read_only, ct.case_definition_key, ct.case_definition_version_tag from case_tab ct join form_io_form_definition fd on ct.type = 'FORMIO' and fd.name = ct.content_key and fd.case_definition_key is null left join form_io_form_definition fd2 on fd2.case_definition_key = ct.case_definition_key and fd2.case_definition_version_tag = ct.case_definition_version_tag and fd2.name = fd.name where fd2.id is null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into form_io_form_definition (id, name, form_definition, read_only, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag) select UUID(), fd.name, fd.form_definition, fd.read_only, ct.case_definition_key, ct.case_definition_version_tag from case_tab ct join form_io_form_definition fd on ct.type = 'FORMIO' and fd.name = ct.content_key and fd.case_definition_key is null left join form_io_form_definition fd2 on fd2.case_definition_key = ct.case_definition_key and fd2.case_definition_version_tag = ct.case_definition_version_tag and fd2.name = fd.name where fd2.id is null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into form_io_form_definition (id, name, form_definition, read_only, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag) select gen_random_uuid(), fd.name, fd.form_definition, fd.read_only, cwtw.case_definition_key, cwtw.case_definition_version_tag from case_widget_tab_widget cwtw join form_io_form_definition fd on fd.name = cwtw.properties->>'formDefinitionName' and fd.case_definition_key is null left join form_io_form_definition fd2 on fd2.case_definition_key = cwtw.case_definition_key and fd2.case_definition_version_tag = cwtw.case_definition_version_tag and fd2.name = fd.name where fd2.id is null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into form_io_form_definition (id, name, form_definition, read_only, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag) select UUID(), fd.name, fd.form_definition, fd.read_only, cwtw.case_definition_key, cwtw.case_definition_version_tag from case_widget_tab_widget cwtw join form_io_form_definition fd on fd.name = JSON_EXTRACT(cwtw.properties, '$.formDefinitionName') and fd.case_definition_key is null left join form_io_form_definition fd2 on fd2.case_definition_key = cwtw.case_definition_key and fd2.case_definition_version_tag = cwtw.case_definition_version_tag and fd2.name = fd.name where fd2.id is null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: insert into case_tag ( case_tag_key, case_definition_key, case_definition_version_tag, case_tag_title, case_tag_color, case_tag_order ) select ct.case_tag_key, ct.case_definition_key, cd.case_definition_version_tag, ct.case_tag_title, ct.case_tag_color, ct.case_tag_order from case_tag ct join case_definition cd on cd.case_definition_key = ct.case_definition_key

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: update case_tag_link ctl set case_definition_version_tag = d.case_definition_version_tag from json_schema_document d where ctl.json_schema_document_id = d.json_schema_document_id
delete from case_tag where case_definition_version_tag is null

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: update case_tag_link ctl join json_schema_document d on ctl.json_schema_document_id = d.json_schema_document_id set ctl.case_definition_version_tag = d.case_definition_version_tag
delete from case_tag where case_definition_version_tag is null
